title: PhaseHandoff
description: Main-session ↔ sub-coordinator handoff contract. Each phase subagent returns one of phase_a_output / phase_b_output / phase_c_output. Main session parses by this schema — no prose interpretation. All phases write exceptions to $WORKSPACE/phase-<a|b|c>-error.json and set error_path; main session relays that file to the user verbatim and stops.

cwd.description: Main session's current working directory. Phase A computes $SCOPE by walking up to the nearest CLAUDE.md from here.

user_request.description: Verbatim /preflight invocation — argument, pasted text, or the chat-handle keyword.

now_iso.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at invocation. Phase A uses this to timestamp $WORKSPACE name deterministically.

resume_from.description: Workspace path if user chose to resume an interrupted run; null otherwise.

gate_answers.description: Only present on Phase A re-iteration — user's answers to the previous gate that changed load-bearing facts, forcing brief/ground_truth regeneration.

workspace_path.description: Absolute path to $WORKSPACE. Main session passes this as input to Phase B and stores for potential resume.

last_completed_step.description: Highest step completed. Normal completion = 6 (gate emitted or auto-proceed decided).

gate.description: null when no blockers (auto-proceed to Phase B). Object when user must answer.

questions_count.description: Count of questions in gate.json — if > 5, Phase A aborts instead (see 'aborted').

render.description: Markdown body of gate.md. Emit empty string AND render_too_long: true when gate.md exceeds 4000 chars — main session falls back to reading the file from disk.

render_too_long.description: Set true when gate.md was too large to inline; main session reads workspace_path/gate.md instead.

aborted.description: Set when Phase A decided the premise is broken and panel should not run. Main session surfaces reason to user and stops.

error_path.description: Absolute path to $WORKSPACE/phase-a-error.json if an exception was raised. Main session reads, prints, and stops.

gate_answers_path.description: Absolute path to gate_answers.json if gate ran; null if Phase A auto-proceeded.

report.description: Markdown body of report.md. Emit empty string AND report_too_long: true when report.md exceeds 15000 chars — main session falls back to reading from report_path.

skipped_experts.description: Roles whose expert call failed twice and were dropped from synthesis.

drift_refreshed.description: True when step-8 drift pre-check re-ran file_verifications/already_done against a moved HEAD.

polished_report_path.description: Absolute path to report.polished.md, or null when the rubber-duck step was skipped (chat/inline target or < 4k artifact).

kb_summary.description: One-line summary for main session to surface: 'KB applied: <role1>:+N, ... · compacted: <roles>'.
